message:
fix: release mutex before sleeping in MockHidDevice::read_timeout

The previous implementation held the mutex lock during the timeout sleep,
causing potential contention in multi-threaded tests. Additionally, events
were being popped from the queue before checking connection status, which
caused events to be lost across disconnect/reconnect cycles.

The fix restructures the code to:
- Only pop events if the device is connected
- Release the lock before sleeping
- Use cleaner match-based control flow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
